headline: A Look At Travelers Companies (TRV) Valuation As Recent Returns Soften Against Longer Term Gains
summary: Recent share performance and current positioning Travelers Companies (TRV) stock has been relatively steady, with the price at $299.94 and returns that have eased over the past week, month, and past 3 months while remaining positive over longer periods.
